name: AEye, Inc.
business: AEye provides physical AI sensing solutions built on high-performance, active lidar systems for vehicle autonomy, advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS), robotic vision, and non-automotive applications.
sellsTo: Non-Automotive customers in rail, aerospace/defense, smart infrastructure, security, construction, mining, agriculture, intelligent transportation systems

exposures.sentence: AEye's Intelligent Sensing Platform includes a solid-state software definable active lidar sensor, an adaptive sensing SmartScan architecture to scan dynamic scenes/targets, and a sophisticated signal processing capability that provides precise measurements and imaging for various safety-critical applications.
Our Intelligent Sensing Platform is software-definable and network-optimized, and leverages deterministic artificial intelligence at the edge.

We are a provider of physical AI sensing solutions built on high-performance, active lidar systems for vehicle autonomy, advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS), robotic vision and a range of Non-Automotive applications.

Our proprietary Intelligent Sensing Platform incorporates a solid state, software definable active lidar sensor; an adaptive SmartScan architecture... designed to support a broad set of markets beyond passenger vehicles, including rail, aerospace and defense, smart infrastructure, and security.

We believe there are numerous use cases for lidar outside automotive, including rail, construction, mining, agriculture, aerospace, defense, security, foreign object detection, and intelligent transportation systems.

We are a provider of physical AI sensing solutions built on high-performance, active lidar systems for vehicle autonomy, advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS), robotic vision and a range of Non-Automotive applications.

catalysts.event: Launch of Apollo TM lidar sensor
catalysts.sentence: In June 2024, we launched Apollo TM , the first product in our family of next generation lidar sensors.

catalysts.event: Engagement of LITEON as Tier 1 automotive supplier
catalysts.sentence: In early 2024, we engaged LITEON as our Tier 1 automotive supplier and are actively working with LITEON to bring our product to market.

catalysts.event: Strategic partnership with Accelight Technologies and LighTekton for China market
catalysts.sentence: In May 2024, we announced a strategic partnership with Accelight Technologies, Inc. ("ATI") and LighTekton Co., Ltd to manufacture and distribute our products in China.

catalysts.event: Validation of lidar on NVIDIA DRIVE AGX platform
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we announced the validation of our lidar technology on the NVIDIA DRIVE AGX platform.

catalysts.event: Launch of OPTIS physical AI solution
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we launched OPTIS , a complete physical AI solution designed to modernize legacy infrastructure and deliver actionable intelligence across diverse industries.

catalysts.event: Expansion of LITEON production line with capacity up to 60,000 units annually
catalysts.sentence: We announced an expansion of this relationship and an investment from a leading global institutional investor to fund a dedicated production line for Apollo TM , with capacity to produce up to 60,000 units annually.
In January 2026, we introduced STRATOS , the next product in this family.
These warrants were exercised in full on July 28, 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Potential $2.5 billion market opportunity in China.
tamClaims.sentence: This collaboration provides us with access to a potential $2.5 billion market opportunity.
